diagrams.title: General Register Stack Organization
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the general register stack organization, including the stack pointer, stack frame, and registers.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of the general register stack organization and its components.

diagrams.title: Register vs Memory
diagrams.description: A diagram comparing and contrasting registers and memory, including their characteristics and uses.
diagrams.purpose: To highlight the differences between registers and memory and their roles in the general register stack organization.

diagrams.title: Stack Operations
diagrams.description: A diagram illustrating the push and pop operations, including the movement of the stack pointer and the addition and removal of elements.
diagrams.purpose: To demonstrate the push and pop operations and their effects on the stack.
